title: Health Display Datapack
description: A datapack that can provide real-time mob's health rate
body:
This datapack can give real-time data of mob's health percentage and display in a visual way
这个数据包可以让你查看生物的实时血量百分数并提供可视化（需要资源包）
# **Functions**
- Mobs now show their HP percentage information above them, and the percentage will change when their HP changes
- If a mob is close to a player ,the percentage information will display, however if it is far from the player, the information will hide 
- The percentage information has a visually-improved effect when you install the resource pack like this:![an example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d123cd5f1b97749df1eeac6c7dfdc4c63435e356.jpeg)
# **Warnings**
- Because the datapack use mob's custom name to achieve the function, so it will definitely conflict with name tags using
- When you uninstall the datapack, the mob who already has a custom name will not disappear
